raw: {"perspective": "Assessment Science", "findings": [{"severity": "Critical", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/core/assessment/engine.py", "issue": "IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) are guessed, not calibrated from real data", "recommended_fix": "Recalibrate parameters using real data to minimize SEM impact"}, {"severity": "Major", "file_or_area": "Question pool", "issue": "Insufficient question pool size per competency (less than 15 for CAT, less than 30 for reliable theta estimation)", "recommended_fix": "Increase question pool size to meet minimum requirements"}, {"severity": "Minor", "file_or_area": "DIF analysis", "issue": "No DIF analysis performed to check for biased questions against AZ/CIS test-takers", "recommended_fix": "Conduct DIF analysis to ensure fairness"}, {"severity": "Critical", "file_or_area": "CAT stopping rules", "issue": "SE threshold may not be appropriate", "recommended_fix": "Review and adjust SE threshold to ensure accurate assessment"}, {"severity": "Major", "file_or_area": "Temporal decay rationale", "issue": "180-day half-life may not be evidence-based", "recommended_fix": "Review and update temporal decay rationale based on evidence"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) are guessed, not calibrated from real data
findings.recommended_fix: Recalibrate parameters using real data to minimize SEM impact

findings.issue: Insufficient question pool size per competency (less than 15 for CAT, less than 30 for reliable theta estimation)
findings.recommended_fix: Increase question pool size to meet minimum requirements

findings.issue: No DIF analysis performed to check for biased questions against AZ/CIS test-takers
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct DIF analysis to ensure fairness

findings.issue: SE threshold may not be appropriate
findings.recommended_fix: Review and adjust SE threshold to ensure accurate assessment
Review and update temporal decay rationale based on evidence
